prompt: Create a cinematic photorealistic urban fantasy scene in a gritty alley at sunset, showing one enormous black charcoal and ember-orange dragon as a massive wall mural that appears to be coming alive from the side of an old brick building. The dragon has a long serpentine neck, horned head, glowing amber eyes, sharp teeth, many jagged spines, layered armor-like scales, and two vast bat-like wings spread across the wall; its body and wings blend into the brick texture like street art but with 3D realism and fiery orange light glowing through the wing membranes and scale gaps. The setting is a narrow abandoned New York-style industrial alley with tall brick buildings, metal fire escapes on the left, dark windows, graffiti along the lower wall, weeds and debris near the base of the building, and wet cracked pavement full of puddles reflecting the dragon and sunset. Place the low sun near the far end of the alley, casting strong golden backlight, long shadows, orange highlights, and dramatic contrast against the dark brick. Use a wide-angle perspective from ground level, vertical walls towering upward, the dragon dominating the right two-thirds of the composition and the alley receding into the glowing horizon on the left. Style should be ultra-detailed, realistic, high dynamic range, cinematic fantasy concept art, moody urban decay, sharp scale texture, damp reflective ground, warm orange and black color palette, no people, no readable text, no logos, no watermark. Optional greeting mood: Happy Dragon Day, wonderful and awe-inspiring.
